findings.issue: No test covers a non-empty runs map where every entry is active:false; the legacy-fallback branch is keyed purely on entries.length === 0 (runs-board.tsx:21). Every existing non-empty-runs test includes at least one active entry.
findings.fix_hint: Add a test with 2+ all-inactive entries asserting dimmed rows render and legacy text is absent. Already tracked as plans/019 (MED) but left deferred/unfixed in this PR.

findings.issue: The panel-level req:3.2 test uses an engine:null fixture, so the expected '—' output would pass even if RunsBoard were wired with the wrong props — it doesn't prove correct end-to-end wiring of a real engine object.
findings.fix_hint: Drive a non-null-engine, runs-absent fixture through the full ConsolePanel shell and assert the exact non-dash summary text.
